productName: Stinger Sweets Pineapple Juice .5g 2pk - Pineapple Juice - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Pineapple, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of tropical, pineapple, and sweet, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
